subcodes.first_line: O Upholder of the Faith! The Faith hath been established, and the Rising hath been made manifest, yet the people remain in wondrous stupor. The tribes have been seized with trembling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قائم الدین قد قام الدین و ظهر القیام و القوم فی سکر عجاب اخذت الزلازل قبائل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @call to action, @predictions and prophecies
